## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content progress, performance tracking, and technical SEO improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content uploading process has begun smoothly in Kramer, with 3 articles already uploaded](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Performance tracking Looker Studio dashboard is set up and ready for use once content is published](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [SchoolAI needs assistance with technical SEO improvements across their site](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [GrowthX team to propose data-heavy content ideas for attracting high-quality backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

## Topics

### Content Upload Progress

  - [3 articles have been uploaded to Kramer platform](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Process has been smooth and straightforward](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Team to complete uploading this week's articles](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Minor issue: difficulty locating meta area for individual pages](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Looker Studio performance tracker built and shared](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Tracks content published by GrowthX, categorized as in Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)

  - [Customizable by date range and content categories](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)

### Backlinking Strategy

  - [GrowthX team analyzed SchoolAI's backlink profile in SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Plan to create data-heavy content pieces to attract high-quality backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Example: "Impact of AI on K-12 Education: Key Statistics and Trends for 2025"](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Previous success: 40 backlinks (DA 50+) within 1-2 months for a stats-heavy article](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)

### Technical SEO Support

  - [SchoolAI identified need for technical SEO improvements across the site](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Areas of focus: missing tags, sitemap structure optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [GrowthX to assess internal resources for providing support](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Cameron to compile a list of specific technical SEO needs](https://fathom.video/share/zKHj-CXqys7gsFZTd9D_EqnrZy5zzoDZ?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
